title: Tournefortia chrysantha
taxonomy: Tournefortia chrysantha is classified within the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the borage or forget-me-not family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its flowers and leaves, which are typical of the Boraginaceae family. The genus Tournefortia is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Within the Boraginaceae family, Tournefortia chrysantha is likely a member of the tribe Boragineae, which is a large and diverse group of plants. Further research would be needed to confirm the exact classification of Tournefortia chrysantha.
